nodes.label: MIDI Event In
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI event from the parent processor chain

nodes.label: Event Type?
nodes.description: Base class processHiseEvent() dispatches by event type

nodes.label: Set Channel
nodes.description: Message.setChannel(channel) overwrites the event's MIDI channel in-place

nodes.label: Channel Number
nodes.description: Target MIDI channel (1-16), set via onControl() from the UI knob

nodes.label: MIDI Event Out
nodes.description: Event continues down the processor chain with rewritten channel
